required_layers.name: topology
required_layers.purpose: Primary spawn mask (Field, Forest, Mountain, Roadside)

required_layers.name: biome
required_layers.purpose: Spawn weight modifiers (Snow/Desert for Sulfur, Temperate for Stone)

required_layers.name: splat
required_layers.purpose: Ground texturing (Rock, Dirt) which heavily dictates node clusters

required_layers.name: height
required_layers.purpose: Slope calculation to exclude steep cliffs and underwater areas

processing_pipeline: 1. Extract uncompressed byte arrays from Rust Map via Facepunch.LZ4. 2. Normalize arrays to 0-1 grid. 3. Apply Rust SpawnHandler weights. 4. Render heatmap tiles.
